description: Two SessionStart hooks plus a PreToolUse guard. (1) Clear the per-session `.claude/plans/.primed` marker (so the ensure-primed gate re-triggers this session, incl. after /clear) and auto-prime when the project is onboarded (.claude/project/intent.md present); silent otherwise. Non-Craft projects are never nudged — the user opts in by invoking /craft. (2) Surface any pending `.craft/handoff.md` markers from active worktrees so paused slices are visible at the start of a new session. (3) PreToolUse: readonly-context-guard.sh denies Write/Edit/NotebookEdit targeting a read-only context source — the in-repo research/ folder or any declared connected project (F1).
